questions.text: How likely are you to recommend this course to a colleague?
questions.description: Please choose one number, where 1 means you are extremely unlikely to recommend the course and 10 means you are extremely likely to recommend it.

questions.text: How confident are you now in your ability to use generative AI effectively and ethically in your work?
options: I am not using generative AI yet

questions.text: As a result of this course, are you clearer about what not to do when using generative AI in your work?
As a result of this course, which of the following are you now more likely to do when using generative AI in your work?
options: Create content (for example, text, images, audio, video)
Edit content (for example, text, images, audio, video)
Analyze, sort, label, or organize data
Translate into other languages or simplify into plain language

questions.text: Whether or not you currently use generative AI in your work, do you think generative AI could make your work easier, harder, or neither?
What is your most impactful use of Generative AI now? Please describe one example.

condition.value: I am not using generative AI yet

questions.text: As a result of this course, what is one specific task or workflow you now feel better prepared to do with the help of GenAI?
Were you able to complete the exercises suggested in the course?
options: No, I did not have enough time to attempt the exercises
No, I decided not to do the exercises
No, I was not able to access the appropriate websites or tools
Yes, I attempted but did not complete any exercises
Yes, I completed some of the exercises
Yes, I completed all of the exercises

questions.text: Please tell us anything you would like us to know about this course. We especially welcome feedback that will help us improve it for future learners.
